aboutMe.title: About Me
description: Hello, my name is Víctor Manuel.

I am a technical profile transitioning into the renewable energy sector, currently training as a wind turbine maintenance technician. My background is in industrial logistics and CNC mechanics, and along the way I also trained as a Full Stack web developer, which gives me a distinct technological edge.

I have a driver's license and my own vehicle, I am available to travel, and I am eager to contribute in a sector with a real future. This portfolio showcases my tech projects, reflecting my more digital side.
